_comment: This site can host more than one ROM/device combination — each one is a 'profile' below, and a switcher in the header lets visitors flip between them (also shareable/bookmarkable via a ?rom=<id> URL param). Add a new profile by copying one and giving it a unique 'id'. Everything inside a profile — rom, device, theme, installGuide, links, remote — works exactly like the single-profile data.json from before.

hub._comment: Identity for the whole collection/maintainer — shown in the nav brand (all views) and on the all-builds grid (only relevant when there's more than one profile below).
hub.title: SkyX-Arch Builds
hub.subtitle: All custom ROM builds maintained by SkyX-Arch — pick a device below.

remote._comment: Live data sources for this device. Point releaseJsonUrl/changelogUrl at your own ROM's feed to switch devices.

releaseJsonMap._comment: Every ROM's OTA JSON names its fields a little differently — this maps THIS ROM's field names onto the page's internal fields, so a different ROM can be supported by editing this block instead of assets/js/main.js.
releaseJsonMap.filenamePatternComment: Optional. Named-group regex to pull the device codename / Android base version out of the build filename, e.g. crDroidAndroid-16.0-20260705-plato-v12.11.zip. Leave unset to keep device.codename / latestRelease.androidBase as configured below instead.

changelogMap._comment: Changelog text formats vary between ROMs too (bullet character, date-line format). Defaults below match a 'YYYY-MM-DD' date line followed by '-' bulleted changes, with '----'/'====' style underlines auto-ignored.

theme._comment: Optional. Override the site's Material You accent colors to match this ROM's branding — everything else (gradients, badges, hover states, button backgrounds) derives from these automatically. Leave a value out to keep the default. onPrimary (filled-button text color) is auto-computed for contrast if omitted.

rom.name: crDroid
rom.tagline: Custom Android firmware built for speed, privacy and a clean, distraction-free experience.

latestRelease.summary: The newest crDroid build for plato. See the full changelog below for everything that changed.

changes: Improved refresh rate behavior for smoother animations and scrolling
Enabled advanced ZRAM and UFS performance optimizations for better multitasking
Enabled Zero Shutter Lag (ZSL) support for faster camera capture

installGuide._comment: Fully data-driven install guide — works for any ROM/device. 'linkRef' on a requirement points at a key in 'links' below so it always matches the Downloads button; use 'url' instead for a one-off link that doesn't belong in 'links'.
installGuide.otaNote: Already running a previous build of this ROM? You don't need to flash from scratch — just download the new build, install it through the ROM's built-in OTA/updater app (or by sideloading it in Recovery), and reboot. The full steps below are only for a clean install or coming from stock/another ROM.
installGuide.warning: You are responsible for your own actions and device. Neither the ROM developer nor the author of this guide is responsible for any damage, data loss, or other issues that may occur during the installation process.
prerequisites: The engineering firmware preloader must be flashed before installing the ROM.
installGuide.importantNote: Flashing the engineering firmware preloader is strongly recommended. It provides an additional recovery path and may allow restoring stock firmware without requiring service center assistance if something goes wrong.

steps.title: Flash the Engineering Firmware Preloader
steps.description: Boot the device into Fastboot mode by holding Volume Down + Power until the FASTBOOT screen appears. Flash the preloader:

alternative.note: If the commands fail, use the alternative partition names:

steps.title: Flash Boot Images
steps.note: The device should now boot into Recovery.

steps.title: Format Data
steps.important: Formatting data is required when installing the ROM.

steps.title: Flash crDroid
steps.note: If Recovery prompts for a reboot at approximately 47%, confirm it.

steps.title: Flash GApps (Optional)
steps.description: If you require Google services, flash the GApps package after installing the ROM:

steps.title: Reboot
steps.note: Complete the Android setup process and enjoy crDroid.
